mission: Desktop App Feature Parity & UX Audit — Execute audit findings. Fix blocking installCli IPC bug, deliver Phase 1 quick wins, then proceed through Phases 2-3.
waves_completed: execution slice 1 — installCli IPC handler fix (this session)
execution slices 2-4 — session search filters, MCP dialog, keyboard shortcut overlay (this session)

blocking_bug_status.description: installCli IPC channel exposed in preload bridge but no ipcMain.handle existed
blocking_bug_status.fix: Created packages/desktop/src/main/install-cli.ts (+122 lines) and added additive handler in packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts (+2 lines). The handler determines user bin dir, creates shell wrapper script invoking bun/node with opencode entry point, returns installed path.

phase1_delivered.what: Combined text search + time-range filter (All/Today/Week/Month) via MenuV2.RadioGroup dropdown
Health status indicators (green/yellow/red dots), add server form (name+URL), remove/disconnect button
Hold-modifier (Meta/Ctrl) for 500ms shows floating overlay with all registered commands grouped by category. Uses existing useCommand system, KeybindV2 components.

phase1_remaining: Agent configuration UI (create/edit custom agents — entirely missing)
existing_dirty_files_to_preserve: packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts (runtime performance edits from prior sessions)
known_issues: Pre-existing typecheck errors in @opencode-ai/app: Settings type missing 'setOnboarded' and 'showSessionViz' properties — not caused by this lane's changes
Keyboard shortcut overlay won't appear in CI/headless — requires real keyboard events
MCP add form only supports remote servers with name+URL (no advanced config like headers/OAuth)
MCP remove button disconnects but doesn't fully delete config — no mcp.remove() API exists
recommended_next_step: Proceed with remaining Phase 1 items: Agent configuration UI (dialog for creating/editing custom agents with system prompt, model selection, provider config). This is the highest-impact missing feature — the TUI has it, desktop has a dropdown but no creation/edit UI. Then context display indicator, then settings polish. After Phase 1, proceed to Phase 2: Plugin marketplace, GitHub integration, full MCP management, subagent delegation, stats dashboard.
